---
title: "Policy Brief Title"
author:
  - name: "Author One"
    email: "author.one@example.org"
    corresponding: true
    affiliation:
      - "1"
affiliations:
  - id: "1"
    name: "Institute Name"
abstract: |
  Replace this placeholder with a concise summary of the policy brief.
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  typstR-typst: default
typstR:
  format-variant: brief
  keywords:
    - keyword one
    - keyword two
  report-number: "PB 001"
  funding: |
    This research was supported by...
---

## Key Findings

Summarize the most important findings for a policy audience.

## Background

Provide brief context for the policy question.

## Evidence

Present key evidence supporting the findings.

## Policy Implications

Describe actionable policy recommendations.

## References
